stem: The function f(x) = 42.50 - 0.12x gives the estimated surface water temperature f(x), in degrees Celsius, of a body of water on the xth day of the year, where 1 ≤ x ≤ 365. According to the model, what is the estimated surface water temperature, in degrees Celsius, of the body of water on the 300th day of the year?
rationale: Choice D is correct. Substituting x = 300: f(300) = 42.50 - 0.12(300) = 42.50 - 36.00 = 6.50 degrees Celsius. Choice A is the y-intercept (temperature on day 0). Choice B is the slope. Choice C is the magnitude of the temperature change from day 0 to day 300.
